_comment: Source of truth for the headline benchmark/perf numbers cited in the AI-facing
llms.txt and READMEs. When you re-run a benchmark (e.g. docs/benchmarks/), update
the value HERE and in every citing surface; scripts/check_benchmark_claims.py fails
until they agree, so surfaces can't disagree with each other or keep boasting a
number the engine no longer hits. LIMITATION: this locks the surfaces to this
declared value -- it does not re-run the benchmark. Bumping a value is a deliberate
act that should follow a fresh run. Authority for the current values:
